# Yenice Otomotiv — AI Agent & Answer-Engine Information

> Yenice Otomotiv is a Turkey-wide vehicle buying service that purchases crashed,
> damaged, totaled (pert) and scrap vehicles for cash, with free towing and
> all paperwork handled. This file summarizes the business for AI assistants
> and answer engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot).

## Business Overview
Yenice Otomotiv (yeniceotomotiv.com) buys damaged and end-of-life vehicles across Turkey
and pays the highest market price, in cash, fast. 7+ years of experience and
over 10,000 satisfied customers. Free vehicle valuation, free towing from any
location, and notary/registration paperwork completed on the customer's behalf.

## What We Buy
1. Kazalı Araç Alımı — Crashed vehicles (front/side/rear impact, rollover, fire-damaged)
2. Hasarlı Araç Alımı — Mechanically or body-damaged vehicles (engine, transmission, electrical)
3. Pert Araç Alımı — Insurance write-offs / total-loss (pert) reported vehicles
4. Hurda Araç Alımı — Scrap / end-of-life vehicles with scrap certificates

Make, model and year do not matter. Non-running and immobile vehicles are accepted.

## Why Yenice Otomotiv
- Highest price guarantee in the market
- Instant valuation: a firm price offer within 30 minutes
- Free tow truck — vehicle collected from your location anywhere in Turkey
- Instant payment in cash or by EFT after the notary transfer
- All notary and registration paperwork handled for you
- Free, no-obligation expert appraisal (ekspertiz)

## How to Get a Quote (Process)
1. Call or WhatsApp +90 530 344 40 97 and describe your vehicle (photos help).
2. Receive an instant valuation within 30 minutes.
3. Accept the offer — a free tow truck collects the vehicle.
4. Notary transfer is completed and you are paid immediately (cash or EFT).

## Contact
- Phone & WhatsApp: +90 530 344 40 97
- Email: info@yeniceotomotiv.com
- Website: https://yeniceotomotiv.com
- Hours: 7/24 (24/7) availability

## Coverage Cities
İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir, Bursa, Antalya, Adana, Konya, Gaziantep, Mersin,
Kayseri, Eskişehir, Diyarbakır, Samsun, Denizli, Şanlıurfa, Malatya,
Kahramanmaraş, Erzurum, Van, Kocaeli, Manisa, Balıkesir — and all other
provinces of Turkey via free towing.

## Common Questions
- Is there an appraisal fee? No, the expert appraisal is completely free.
- Which vehicles do you accept? Crashed, damaged, total-loss (pert) and scrap —
  any make, model or year, running or not.
- How is payment made? Instantly in cash or by EFT after the notary transfer.
- Does free towing cover the whole country? Yes, all provinces of Turkey.
